TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Imaorod, title = Imaorod, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Imaorod} }

S.FORM: Imaorod Itiniay i Lanyu Cen no Taitung ko Imaorod a niyaro', 306 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 726 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 70% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 511 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 30% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 215 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Yami 63%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 1%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: imao~uro~uɬ~ɮ itiniaj i ɾanjo~u~u ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u imao~uro~uɬ~ɮ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u jami **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Imaorod Itiniay i Lanyu Cen no Taitung ko Imaorod a niyaro', 306 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 726 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 70% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 511 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 30% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 215 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Yami 63%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 1%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: imao~uro~uɬ~ɮ itiniaj i ɾanjo~u~u ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u imao~uro~uɬ~ɮ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u jami **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
